title: Synergy Property Development is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Synergy Property Development is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!
